acquisition method: the mass spectrometer was operated in a ‘top10’ mode
cleavage agent: enzymatic digestion with sequencing grade trypsin
fractionation method: the alternative method of gel-aided rather than filter-aided sample preparation
fragmentation method: generate fragment ions by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: a Q Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: 1μl of 0.1M DTT (Invitrogen) was added to samples
